{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Jade madra
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Whitehall]] uses [[Jade madra]] to power his voice.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13">''Unsouled'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
